description: FreeSurfer-guided oblique MRI slice reconstruction. Click any point on a cortical surface (lh.pial / rh.pial) in the 3-D view; the selected 2-D slice view is instantly reoriented to the tangent plane at that point so you can scroll through oblique slices along the surface normal axis. Optionally generate a full resampled volume and export as DICOM.
name: SurfaceNormalSlicer
